privileged_info_summary: The task 'substitute_meeting_attendee@1' operates on a synthetic event named 'Marketing Campaign Review' created with attendees Alice Johnson and Carol Martinez. The task requires replacing Carol Martinez with David Chen while preserving Alice Johnson. All attendees are synthetic contacts created by the environment setup script at setup_data.py (Alice Johnson: Senior Financial Analyst, Carol Martinez: Marketing Manager, David Chen: Lead Engineer, all with @northbridge.org domain). The event is initialized to occur on Tuesday of next week starting at 14:00 UTC.
